headline: DATA INTEGRITY THAT HOLDS
subheading: Build an ALCOA+ programme that withstands MHRA scrutiny, from governance to audit trail review.
flux_prompt: An abstract clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking trustworthy pharmaceutical data integrity: a luminous, unbroken chain of glowing teal and cyan data nodes flows left to right across a deep navy field, each link forming an interconnected lattice that suggests a protected, tamper-evident audit trail and an unbroken data lifecycle. Translucent frosted-glass panels layer in soft depth, holding faint abstract trend lines and timeline waveforms with no readable characters. A single sample vial silhouette and ribbons of light thread through the structure, symbolising records kept attributable, complete and enduring. One subtle fresh-green status accent pulses softly at a key junction, signalling verified and trustworthy. Cool volumetric lighting rakes across matte navy and glass surfaces with premium reflections, sterile yet reassuring, uncluttered negative space on the left for overlay text. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
